settings.title: Settings

claude.title: Claude Code Integration
claude.description: Register the MCP Server so Claude Code can access your tasks, schedules, and memos via natural language.
claude.notInstalled: Claude Code is not installed. Install it first, then try again.
claude.mcpToolsDescription: Available MCP tools that Claude Code can use to interact with your data.
claude.claudeMdDescription: Edit the CLAUDE.md instructions file used by Claude Code in ~/life-editor/.
claude.skillsDescription: Manage Claude Code skills installed in ~/life-editor/.claude/skills/.

settings.darkModeDesc: Switch between light and dark themes

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.blocked: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in browser settings.
notifications.description: Get notified when work/break sessions end

data.title: Data Management
data.importWarning: Import will overwrite all current data. A backup is created automatically before importing.
data.resetConfirm: All data will be deleted and the app will return to its initial state. This action cannot be undone. A backup is created automatically before resetting. Are you sure?

trash.title: Trash
trash.permanentDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

updates.title: Updates
updates.upToDate: You are running the latest version.

performance.title: Performance Monitor
performance.noMetrics: No IPC metrics recorded yet. Use the app and refresh.

work.title: Work
work.confirmSessionMessage: End this session and start a break?

taskTree.title: Task Tree
taskTree.folderCompleteConfirm: All incomplete tasks in the folder will also be marked as completed. Are you sure?
taskTree.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? It will be moved to Trash.

schedule.noRoutineItems: No routine items for this day.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.noSessions: No work sessions recorded yet. Start a timer to track your work time.

shortcutsTab.toggleMonthWeek: Cycle through month / week / day views

tasksTab.creatingList1: Click the + icons at the top of the sub-sidebar to create a new task or folder.
tasksTab.creatingList2: Press <kbd>n</kbd> (when not typing) to quickly add a new task to the Inbox.
tasksTab.creatingList3: Folders can be nested up to 5 levels deep. Tasks can be placed anywhere.
tasksTab.organizingList1: Reorder: Drag a task/folder to change its position among siblings.
tasksTab.organizingList2: Move into folder: Drag a task onto a folder to nest it inside.
tasksTab.detailsList1: Click a task to view its detail panel on the right.
tasksTab.detailsList2: Edit the title inline, add a rich-text memo, set a scheduled date, or adjust the work duration.
tasksTab.detailsList3: The play button starts a focused timer session for that task.
tasksTab.detailsList4: Press <kbd>{{mod}} + Enter</kbd> to toggle a task between completed and incomplete.
tasksTab.detailsList5: Use <kbd>Tab</kbd> / <kbd>{{shift}} + Tab</kbd> to indent or outdent a task in the tree.
tasksTab.foldersList1: Folders group related tasks. Select a folder to change its color.
tasksTab.foldersList2: Folder colors are inherited by child tasks in Calendar and Analytics views.
tasksTab.softDeleteList1: Deleting a task moves it to the trash (soft delete).
tasksTab.softDeleteList2: Go to Settings → Trash to restore or permanently delete items.
tasksTab.contextMenuList1: Right-click a task or folder in the tree to open the context menu.
tasksTab.contextMenuList2: Available actions: Rename, Add Task, Add Folder, Start Timer, Move to Root, Delete.
tasksTab.tagsList1: Create and manage tags in Settings → Tag Manager (name + color).
tasksTab.tagsList2: Assign tags to tasks from the task detail panel.
tasksTab.tagsList3: Use the tag filter at the top of the task tree to show only matching tasks.

timerTab.pomodoroList1: The timer follows a WORK → BREAK → LONG BREAK cycle.
timerTab.pomodoroList2: Default: 25 min work, 5 min break, 15 min long break after 4 sessions.
timerTab.startingList1: Click the play button on any task to start a focused session.
timerTab.startingList2: Or go to the Work screen for a free (untied) timer.
timerTab.startingList3: Press <kbd>Space</kbd> to toggle play/pause when not typing.
timerTab.startingList4: Press <kbd>r</kbd> to reset the timer when not typing.
timerTab.modalList1: The timer runs as a modal overlay on top of any screen.
timerTab.modalList2: Close the modal with <kbd>Escape</kbd> — the timer keeps running in the background.
timerTab.modalList3: Press <kbd>{{mod}} + {{shift}} + T</kbd> to toggle the timer modal from any screen.
timerTab.modalList4: A mini timer widget appears in the left sidebar while active.
timerTab.soundMixerList1: The Work screen includes an ambient Sound Mixer.
timerTab.soundMixerList2: Mix multiple background sounds (rain, cafe, etc.) with individual volume controls.
timerTab.soundMixerList3: Sound settings are saved to the database and persist across sessions.
timerTab.notificationsList1: Enable browser notifications in Settings to get alerted when a session ends.
timerTab.notificationsList2: Notification permission is requested once on toggle.

calendarTab.viewsList1: Switch between Month, Week, and Day views using the header toggle.
calendarTab.viewsList2: Navigate months/weeks with the arrow buttons.
calendarTab.viewsList3: Click Today to jump back to the current date.
calendarTab.creatingList1: Click on any day cell to create a new task scheduled for that date.
calendarTab.creatingList2: The task is added to the Inbox and a timer session opens automatically.
calendarTab.displayList1: Tasks with a scheduledAt date appear on their calendar day.
calendarTab.displayList2: Task colors are inherited from their parent folder's color.
calendarTab.displayList3: Click a task chip to navigate to the Tasks view with that task selected.
calendarTab.weekViewList1: The week view shows a time grid with hourly rows.
calendarTab.weekViewList2: Tasks are positioned based on their scheduled time.
calendarTab.weekViewList3: All-day or unscheduled-time tasks appear in the top section.
calendarTab.filteringList1: Use folder tags and colors to visually distinguish task categories.
calendarTab.filteringList2: Only non-deleted tasks with scheduled dates appear on the calendar.
calendarTab.dayViewList1: The Day view shows a full-day time grid (0:00–24:00) on the left and a tab panel on the right.
calendarTab.dayViewList2: The Today Flow tab displays a vertical flowchart of your schedule progress.
calendarTab.dayViewList3: The Routines tab manages recurring routines with tags and achievement stats.
calendarTab.routinesList1: Create routines with a title and time range, then assign tags to organize them.
calendarTab.routinesList2: Tagged routines are auto-inserted into the schedule when viewing a date.
calendarTab.routinesList3: View your streak and per-routine completion stats in the stats card.
calendarTab.shortcutsList4: <kbd>m</kbd> — Cycle through month / week / day views.

memoTab.dailyList1: Each day has its own memo — one memo per date, automatically created.
memoTab.dailyList2: Use it as a daily journal, quick notes, or meeting log.
memoTab.dailyList3: Memos are saved to the database and persist across sessions.
memoTab.navigationList1: The left panel shows a list of dates with existing memos.
memoTab.navigationList2: Click a date to view or edit that day's memo.
memoTab.navigationList3: Click the Today button to jump to today's memo.
memoTab.navigationList4: Use the + button to create a new memo for today if none exists.
memoTab.editorList1: Memos use the same TipTap rich text editor as task details.
memoTab.editorList2: Type <kbd>/</kbd> to open slash commands (headings, lists, code blocks, etc.).
memoTab.editorList3: See the Editor tab for the full list of slash commands and formatting.
memoTab.calendarIntegrationList1: Days with memos show an indicator dot on the Calendar view.
memoTab.calendarIntegrationList2: Click a memo indicator on the calendar to navigate to that memo.
memoTab.deletingList1: Click the trash icon next to a memo date to delete it.
memoTab.deletingList2: Memo deletion is permanent — deleted memos cannot be restored.
memoTab.notesList1: Switch to the Notes tab to create free-form notes separate from daily memos.
memoTab.notesList2: Notes are listed in the left panel. Click to view or edit.
memoTab.notesList3: Deleted notes can be restored from Settings → Trash.

analyticsTab.overviewList1: The Analytics dashboard shows key statistics about your tasks.
analyticsTab.overviewList2: Metrics include: total tasks, completed, in progress, and folder count.
analyticsTab.overviewList3: Data updates in real time as you create, complete, or delete tasks.
analyticsTab.completionList1: View your overall completion rate as a percentage with a progress bar.
analyticsTab.completionList2: A separate today's completion rate tracks daily progress.
analyticsTab.completionList3: Use these metrics to monitor your productivity trends.
analyticsTab.workTimeList1: View your work time data in a bar chart broken down by day, week, or month.
analyticsTab.workTimeList2: A separate task bar chart shows work time per task.
analyticsTab.workTimeList3: Summary cards display total work time, session count, and daily average.
analyticsTab.accessingList1: Press <kbd>{{mod}} + 3</kbd> to jump to Analytics from any screen.
analyticsTab.accessingList2: Or click Analytics in the left sidebar.
analyticsTab.accessingList3: Also available via the command palette (<kbd>{{mod}} + K</kbd> → "Analytics").

editorTab.slashCommandsDesc: Type <kbd>/</kbd> in the editor to open the command menu. Start typing to filter commands.
editorTab.markdownShortcutsDesc: The editor supports Markdown-style formatting as you type.
editorTab.sharedUsageNote: This editor is shared across Task Details, Memo, and Notes.

pomodoroTab.settingsList1: Configure durations in the Pomodoro tab on the Work screen.
pomodoroTab.settingsList2: Defaults: 25 min work, 5 min break, 15 min long break, 4 sessions per cycle.
pomodoroTab.settingsList3: Settings cannot be changed while a timer is running.
pomodoroTab.settingsList4: A summary of the current settings is displayed in the left panel.
pomodoroTab.presetsList1: Save the current configuration as a named preset for quick switching.
pomodoroTab.presetsList2: Apply a saved preset to instantly load its durations and session count.
pomodoroTab.presetsList3: Delete presets you no longer need from the preset list.
pomodoroTab.autoStartList1: Enable the auto-start toggle to automatically begin breaks when work ends.
pomodoroTab.autoStartList2: When disabled, you must manually start each break session.

musicTab.soundsList1: Browse all available ambient sounds in the Music tab.
musicTab.soundsList2: Use the search bar to filter sounds by name.
musicTab.soundsList3: Click the preview button to listen before adding to a playlist.
musicTab.soundsList4: Sounds can be filtered by tags for quick discovery.
musicTab.playlistsList1: Create playlists to organize your favorite ambient sounds.
musicTab.playlistsList2: Add sounds to a playlist from the sound browser.
musicTab.playlistsList3: Use Shuffle and Repeat controls for playback variety.
musicTab.playlistsList4: Drag tracks to reorder them within a playlist.
musicTab.tagsList1: Create tags in Settings → Tag Manager to categorize sounds.
musicTab.tagsList2: Filter the sound library by tags to quickly find what you need.
musicTab.customSoundsList1: Upload your own audio files (MP3, WAV, OGG) as custom sounds.
musicTab.customSoundsList2: Rename or delete custom sounds from the sound browser context menu.
musicTab.timerPlaylistList1: Select a Background Playlist on the Work screen to play during timer sessions.
musicTab.timerPlaylistList2: Playback starts automatically when the timer begins and pauses when it stops.

calendar.deleteTaskMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

playlist.empty: No playlists yet. Create one to get started.
playlist.noTracks: No tracks. Add sounds to this playlist.

calendarSidebar.title: Schedule
calendarSidebar.empty: No calendars yet. Create one to filter tasks by folder.

calendarCreate.title: New Calendar
calendarCreate.noFolders: No folders. Create a folder first.

notesView.emptyState: Select a note or create a new one

taskDetail.emptyState: Select a task to view details

taskDetailPanel.selectTask: Select a task to view details

taskDetailSidebar.noSelection: Select a task or folder to view details

wikiTags.title: Tags
wikiTags.description: Manage wiki tags used across tasks, memos, and notes. Type [[tag name]] in any editor to create inline tags.
wikiTags.empty: No tags yet. Type [[tag name]] in an editor to create one.
wikiTags.mergeSelectTarget: Click another tag to merge into
